Author: grimgrum (soft-target fork by Sushii-dev)
Name: Action Camera (Soft Target)
Punchline: GW2-style action camera for FFXIV — soft-target variant.
Description: Fork of grimgrum's Action Camera. The auto-target cone writes to SoftTarget instead of Target, so a manually-cycled hard target (e.g. MMB) always wins and persists. Pairs well with ReAction stacks ordered Target -> Soft Target. Hold or toggle a configurable key to capture the mouse, freely rotate the camera with mouse movement, and auto-face your character toward the camera.
